productDisplayName: FILA Men White Temptation Sports Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with the finest fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This Temptation shoe from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The upper and aggressive lugs on the sole showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovating. These shoes are made for running on all terrains as the powerful outsole and comfortably built inner and upper guarantee maximum comfort. Wear these with breathable nike t-shirts and capris. Upper Mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA midsole for enhanced impact protection Outsole TPU outsole with terraced grooves and brick patterned grooves within the terraced grooves Midsole reinforced onto the midfoot region of the outsole for shock absorption Impact guidance line along the outsole to evenly distribute shock Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
